thesis: Hyperliquid Strategies is the largest publicly traded HYPE treasury vehicle, holding ~17.6M HYPE tokens (~$1.14B). The stock provides equity exposure to the Hyperliquid ecosystem with staking yield. Russell 3000 inclusion on June 26 creates mandatory passive buying. Highly correlated to HYPE price with NAV premium/discount dynamics.

drivers: Crypto treasury narrative attracts premium valuation

risks: NAV premium flips to discount in bear market

base_case.assumptions: HYPE stabilizes $70–$85, PURR trades near NAV with modest premium, staking yield provides steady revenue

catalysts.event: HYPE token unlock (9.92M tokens for core contributors)

key_risks: Mark-to-market volatility — earnings are unrealized gains
NAV premium could flip to discount
